text.title: vui-accessibility-inclusivity Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: voice banking assistant inclusivity audit.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Voice banking assistant. Pre-launch WER audit across 4 slices; prompt simplification pass; transcript surface in mobile app.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0. Gap 5.8 pp < 10 pp; prompts within grade 8; mobile app shows rolling transcript.
